title: Gamingbarn's Morphs
description: Gives players the ability to morph into all kinds of different mobs!
body:
**Gamingbarn's Morphs is a simple Minecraft datapack that lets players morph into different mobs!** To get started, run the following command into chat: `/trigger morph` ![morph menu](https://imgur.com/r8cdDqw.png) Press [T] to be able to click on the different items in the menu. When you've found a morph you wanna try, simply click on it and you will be transformed! ![player morphed as a pig](https://imgur.com/X10zJ8W.png) Some morphs have special abilities that can be activated with [Shift]! For example, the chicken can lay eggs and the spider can climb walls! ![chicken with trail of eggs and spider half-way up wall](https://imgur.com/8GsGx5A.png) If you want to spice things up further, you can run the command, `/trigger skins` to change the variant of certain morphs! ![skins menu](https://imgur.com/1KzjuFl.png) > [![SparkedHost Promotional Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d880ee51aed06a8b0de318249c81b079793a8a8.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2775) > Want a Minecraft server? Consider SparkedHost! Use code GAMINGBARN for 25% off! > [![Discord Promotional Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6dc9d56feee16e94cb60cccde0087803114ac61.jpeg)]([https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg](https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg)) >
***https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg***
> Need help with my datapacks? Found a bug? Want to share some feedback? Join my Discord server! There, I can offer personal help towards any problem you may be having!
